stylesheet: QWidget { background-color: #2E3440; color: #D8DEE9; font-size: 14px; } QDialog { background-color: #1E1E1E; color: white; } QLabel { font-weight: bold; color: #E5E9F0; } QLineEdit { background-color: #3B4252; border: 1px solid #88C0D0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px; color: #D8DEE9; } QPushButton { background-color: #5E81AC; color: white; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: #81A1C1; } QMenuBar { background-color: #1E1E1E; color: white; } QMenuBar::item { background: #1E1E1E; color: white; } QMenuBar::item:selected { background: #0078d4; } QMenu::item:selected { background: #0078d4; }
